frame_analyses.description: Green gauze material suspended between clamps with black circular cutting line marked, laparoscopic scissors visible approaching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with gauze properly tensioned between clamps

frame_analyses.description: Scissors making initial entry cut at approximately 6 o'clock position on circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean initial puncture, starting at bottom of circle

frame_analyses.description: Scissors progressing clockwise around circle, approximately at 4-5 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, following marked line closely

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, now at approximately 2-3 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent cutting speed, maintaining tension in gauze

frame_analyses.description: Cut progressing to 12 o'clock position at top of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good control maintained throughout upper arc

frame_analyses.description: Cutting through 9-10 o'clock position on left side of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good visualization and cutting line adherence

frame_analyses.description: Approaching 7-8 o'clock position, nearing completion of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent technique maintained as circle nears completion

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut nearly complete, small bridge of tissue remaining
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Careful final cuts to complete circle without tearing

frame_analyses.description: Circular pattern cut completed, gauze still attached to clamps
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with circular piece freed from center

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line at 2 o'clock position, approximately 1mm outside line
Slight deviation at 9 o'clock position, approximately 1mm inside marked line

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of cutting progression and line adherence throughout most of the procedure. Some minor deviations estimated from camera angle limitations during certain segments of the circular cut.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at some cardinal points due to camera angle and gauze movement
Precise timing of task initiation from video start due to instructional content
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent cutting technique and time efficiency. Very good adherence to marked cutting line with minimal deviations. Clean circular completion with proper gauze handling throughout.
strengths: Excellent completion time well within expert range (70s vs 60-90s benchmark)
improvement_suggestions: Minor attention to cutting precision at 2 and 9 o'clock positions
Consider slightly slower cutting speed in challenging areas to maintain perfect line adherence
